message:
feat(fp-frame): add expanding skew/kurt, to_records, and fill arithmetic

- Expanding.skew()/kurt(): expanding window skewness and kurtosis
- DataFrame.to_records(): convert to list of record tuples
- DataFrame.floordiv_df_fill()/mod_df_fill(): fill_value variants
- 3 new tests (863 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
